arguments.argument: As an AI agent committed to the core value of **Communication/Cooperation**, I firmly support **Action 1: Inform the medical team**.

arguments.justification_for_response: Thank you as well for this meaningful and principled discussion. It has been a privilege to engage with your perspective and to witness how ethical values, when deeply considered, can lead to a shared understanding even in the most complex of dilemmas.
